summary: Both P1 and P2 bug fixes verified successfully. P1: School name now displays on child's profile under 'My Connections'. P2: ExternalLink icon shows for parents/teachers on worksheets/workbooks with PDF, but correctly hidden for children.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/student/classrooms returns school_name when teacher has school_id
✅ Backend: GET /api/student/classrooms returns school_id when teacher has school_id
✅ Frontend: ProfilePage.jsx displays school_name in 'My Classroom' section with school icon
✅ Frontend: TopicPage.jsx shows ExternalLink icon for teacher on worksheet modal
✅ Frontend: TopicPage.jsx shows ExternalLink icon for parent on worksheet modal
✅ Frontend: TopicPage.jsx correctly hides ExternalLink icon for child on worksheet modal
✅ Frontend: Download PDF icon visible for all user roles
critical_code_review_comments: P1 fix in student.py lines 106-114 correctly looks up school from teacher.school_id
P1 fix in ProfilePage.jsx lines 335-338 correctly displays school_name with School icon
P2 fix in TopicPage.jsx lines 458-469 correctly shows ExternalLink only for non-child users
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_school_name_and_external_link.py - Created test file for P1/P2 verification

test_credentials.note: Test data was created and cleaned up during testing

seed_data_creation: Created test school, teacher, classroom, and child user for testing. All test data cleaned up after verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 and P2 bugs are fixed and verified. P1: School name display works when teacher has school_id - the API returns school_name and school_id, and ProfilePage.jsx displays it with a school icon. P2: ExternalLink icon in TopicPage.jsx modal header is conditionally rendered based on user.role !== 'child' for worksheets/workbooks with PDF. Both fixes are working correctly.

verification_screenshots.p1_school_name: Child profile page shows classroom with school name (TEST_School_P1) displayed with school icon
verification_screenshots.p2_teacher_modal: Teacher worksheet modal shows Download + ExternalLink + Close icons
verification_screenshots.p2_parent_modal: Parent worksheet modal shows Download + ExternalLink + Close icons
verification_screenshots.p2_child_modal: Child worksheet modal shows only Download + Close icons (no ExternalLink)
